description_long: This object appears to be a highly distorted and abstracted representation of a human adult, with elongated and stretched limbs and body. The form is vaguely humanoid, with what seem to be two arms and two legs, but the proportions are extremely exaggerated and the features are unrecognizable. The surface is smooth and uniform, with no visible clothing details, facial features, or anatomical accuracy. The overall shape is thin and angular, with sharp bends and points where the limbs extend. The object lacks any clear separation between body parts, and the geometry is warped in a way that makes it difficult to discern specific human features. The asset gives the impression of a glitched or corrupted digital scan of a person.
description: A highly distorted, abstract humanoid form with elongated limbs and a smooth, featureless surface. The object is warped and lacks recognizable human details.
description_view_0: This view shows the central body mass with two elongated, angular limbs extending outward, and a twisted upper section.
description_view_1: From this angle, the stretched limbs are more prominent, with one limb bent sharply and the body appearing extremely thin.
description_view_2: The back view highlights the tapering of the body and the unnatural extension of the limbs, with little anatomical detail.
description_view_3: This side view emphasizes the flatness and length of the form, with limbs extending far from the central mass.
